action.content: Write an itinerary for a trip to a grocery store in Lima to buy some local goods. Make the itinerary funny, write it in all capital letters and include the keywords 'DISGUSTING', 'DELICIOUS', 'BAD', and 'GOOD'.
action.label: context

action.content:
MONDAY: ARRIVAL IN LIMA. I WILL WALK INTO THE GROCERY STORE WITH THE COURAGE OF A MAN WHO HAS NEVER EATEN A BUG. I WILL SCAN THE AISLES FOR THE **GOOD** STUFF, LIKE FRESH AVOCADOS AND SWEET BANANAS. I WILL AVOID THE **BAD** STUFF, WHICH IS EVERYTHING THAT LOOKS LIKE IT WAS LEFT IN THE SUN FOR A WEEK.

TUESDAY: THE MEAT SECTION. I WILL APPROACH THE CHICKEN WITH CAUTION. IF IT LOOKS TOO RED, IT IS **DISGUSTING**. I WILL PICK UP THE PASTA, WHICH IS **DELICIOUS** WHEN COOKED WITH TOMATO SAUCE. I WILL ALSO BUY SOME CHEESE, BUT ONLY IF IT DOESN'T SMELL LIKE A FARMYARD.

WEDNESDAY: THE PRODUCE. I WILL BUY LIME, WHICH IS ESSENTIAL FOR EVERY MEAL. I WILL ALSO GET SOME SWEET POTATOES. I WILL AVOID THE STRANGE FRUITS THAT LOOK LIKE THEY WERE GROWN IN A CRYPT. I WILL FILL MY CART WITH **GOOD** ITEMS AND LEAVE THE **BAD** ONES FOR THE RATS.

THURSDAY: CHECKOUT. I WILL PAY FOR MY **DELICIOUS** PASTA AND **GOOD** FRUITS. I WILL NOT BUY THE **DISGUSTING** MEAT OR THE **BAD** VEGETABLES. I WILL WALK OUT OF THE STORE FEELING SMART AND NOT SICK.
action.label: response
